title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 3 - 2017: Greek Classics

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog while high, describing a productive stay-at-home day where he worked on Greek classic books and listened to history content. He mentions getting very little sleep but staying focused and working late into the night.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: staying in leads to more productivity — plans to do it as long as possible
willing to push through on three hours of sleep to keep working
